2026/05/26 21:15:20.798126880 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798127712 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798145044 {

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798157518 new <- list()

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798171184 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798282043 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798282815 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798295458 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798296180 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798309054 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798309775 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798336686 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798361613 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798362405 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798375058 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798375840 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798389566 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798390367 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798427457 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798428349 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798442566 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798443287 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798456963 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798457674 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798471130 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798471881 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798485787 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798486499 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798499714 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798500525 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798518910 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798519621 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798561941 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798562903 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798580807 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798581558 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798593771 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798594492 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798606114 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798606826 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798622205 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798622946 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798703605 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798726612 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798727734 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798751315 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798761267 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798791785 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798792576 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798807224 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798807985 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798820228 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798820940 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798863811 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798864672 version <- old$version

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798145044 {

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798282815 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798295458 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798296180 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798309054 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798309775 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798336686 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798361613 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798362405 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798375058 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798375840 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798389566 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798390367 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798427457 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798428349 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798442566 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798443287 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798456963 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798457674 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798471130 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798471881 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798485787 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798486499 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798499714 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798500525 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798518910 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798519621 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798561941 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798562903 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798580807 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798581558 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798593771 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798594492 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798606114 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798606826 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798622205 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798622946 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798703605 }

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798727734 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798751315 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798761267 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798792576 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798807224 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798807985 }
2026/05/26 21:15:20.798820228 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")

2026/05/26 21:15:20.798863811 }
